nasb.text: Also when the Sidonians, the Amalekites and the Maonites oppressed you, you cried out to Me, and I delivered you from their hands.

esv.text: The Sidonians also, and the Amalekites and the Maonites oppressed you, and you cried out to me, and I saved you out of their hand.

cnv.text: 西頓人、亞瑪力人、馬雲人也都壓迫你們；你們向我哀求，我也拯救你們脫離他們的手。

ccb.text: 西顿人、亚玛力人和马云人的压迫，就呼求我，我岂没有拯救你们吗？
